features.title: ReactJS Frontend Boilerplate
features.description: React 18 + TypeScript + Vite + Tailwind CSS + Redux Toolkit + RTK Query

features.title: Tailwind CSS Styling
features.description: Utility-first CSS framework with custom theme, globals.css, badges, buttons, cards, inputs

features.title: Redux Toolkit + RTK Query
features.description: Centralized state management, API layer, auto-caching, tags invalidation

features.title: JWT Authentication
features.description: Access + refresh tokens, automatic token refresh on 401, secure localStorage

features.title: Order Pages
features.description: Login, Register, Orders List (paginated/filtered), Order Detail, Create Order
